hero.subtitulo: Software Engineer specialized in mobile ecosystems and scalable backend architectures. Available for full-time roles and technical consulting.
acerca.bio1: I am 22 and head the systems department at Grupo SIST MEXIL, leading the development of their mobile app (Flutter) and corporate web platform.
acerca.bio2: My strength is Backend & DB, with solid experience in .NET (C#) and PostgreSQL/SQL Server. I also work with Node.js, TS/JS, React, Next, and Nuxt.
acerca.cta_text: Want to know more about me?
servicios.intro_desc: Flutter mobile ecosystems, relational database optimization, legacy software rescue, and security integrations under strict engineering standards.
servicios.s1_desc: High-performance Flutter apps connected to robust .NET APIs. Full-cycle deployment from database schemas to Google Play Store releases.
servicios.s2_desc: Auditing, refactoring, and migrating slow systems. Clean transition to layered architectures (Controller ➔ Service ➔ Repository) in C#.
servicios.s3_desc: High-throughput microservices using FastAPI/Node.js and security integrations (facial biometrics, scanner integrations, secure billing).
proyectos.card1_desc: Internal web system for managing financial processes, developed as a fullstack application with authentication, roles and administrative operations, focused on improving information organization and reducing manual processes.
proyectos.card2_desc: Complete Pokédex in .NET using C#. Designed under strict clean architecture standards and code conventions (PascalCase for folders/files, and prefixing abstract classes and interfaces with 'A').
proyectos.card3_desc: This very website built with Astro and Tailwind CSS v4. I configured the automated CI/CD pipeline and deployed the production build directly on a self-managed VPS server.
proyectos.card4_desc: Procedural web audiovisual experience. Extreme performance optimization and real-time rendering without external asset dependencies (Zero-Asset), with automated deployment pipelines via GitHub Actions.
proyectos.card5_desc: Interactive NFC tag reading demo with real-time data transmission via WebSockets. Connects an NFC scanner or Android device using Web NFC API to stream card data instantly to a web client.
proyectos.card6_desc: Fork of an early version of the Aerion lightweight mail and calendar client. Explores and implements customized features for calendar management and synchronization using the CalDAV protocol.
exp.empresa_desc_resp: Fullstack development of internal web systems, including backend, APIs and administrative interfaces, working closely with internal users.
exp.empresa_desc_logros: Automation of processes, improvement in information management and delivery of functional solutions used in real operation.
exp.sist_desc_resp: Responsible for the systems department and technical lead in directing and developing two key projects for the private security company: a Flutter mobile app and a corporate web application.
exp.sist_desc_logros: Designing robust backend architectures (.NET/C#), optimizing SQL databases, and coordinating teams for agile software delivery.
exp.uni_carrera: Instituto Tecnológico Superior de Tantoyuca · Computer Systems
exp.uni_desc: Education in Computer Systems Engineering, with a focus on software development, databases and building web systems, applying agile methodologies in academic and practical projects.
exp.concurso_desc: Participation in the Innovatec 2023 contest with the Sabio Verde project, an initiative focused on developing a medicinal plants store, where I collaborated in designing and developing a web solution as part of the team.
contacto.headline: Got a project in mind?
contacto.subheadline: I am open to new opportunities, freelance projects or just chatting about tech.
contacto.footer_made: MADE WITH ☕ AND A LOT OF CSS
serviciopage.title: B2B Consulting
serviciopage.subheadline: Helping startups and enterprises launch production-grade mobile ecosystems and backends with unwavering code discipline.
serviciopage.especialidad_sub: Technical Rigor, Robust Databases, and Autonomous Infrastructure
serviciopage.filosofia_c1_desc: I enforce absolute naming standards (PascalCase for folders/files, prefixing abstract classes/interfaces with 'A') to ensure code remains predictable and easy to maintain by any team.
serviciopage.filosofia_c2_desc: I design and optimize complex relational schemas in PostgreSQL and SQL Server. Specialist in index strategies, query tuning, and secure transactional pipelines.
serviciopage.filosofia_c3_desc: I don't just write code. I build automated CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions), Dockerize containers, and set up secure production VPS servers to eliminate human error.
serviciopage.s1_det_sub: From mobile clients to production API servers
serviciopage.s1_det_desc: I build responsive, high-performance apps using Flutter to guarantee native performance and premium UI. I build and integrate backend APIs (C# .NET or Node.js) featuring JWT auth, push notifications, offline storage (SQLite), and full app store publishing.
serviciopage.s2_det_sub: Modularizing and cleaning up legacy code
serviciopage.s2_det_desc: If your monolithic codebase has become slow or impossible to scale, I refactor it under a strict layered pattern (Controller ➔ Model ➔ Service ➔ Repository ➔ DB). I resolve DB bottlenecks and safely migrate aging systems.
serviciopage.s3_det_desc: I develop lightweight, ultra-fast microservice endpoints (using FastAPI or Node.js) for high-throughput tasks. Experienced in security industry protocols, including facial biometrics, sensor integration, and secure billing gateways.
serviciopage.flow_1_desc: I audit the existing code, database state, and cloud logs to outline realistic, performance-driven fixes.
serviciopage.flow_2_desc: Before writing code, I deliver clear system layouts, database schema designs, and data-flow charts.
serviciopage.flow_3_desc: We iterate with weekly deliverables built under strict coding guidelines and integrated test suites.
serviciopage.flow_4_desc: We configure CI/CD automations on hardened VPS/Cloud environments to keep deployment seamless and safe.
serviciopage.cta_titulo: Facing a complex engineering hurdle for your startup or enterprise?
serviciopage.cta_desc: I am available for technical consulting, end-to-end software delivery, and long-term architectural support.
